top_signals.title: Putin says Russia faces fuel shortages as Ukrainian drones strike refineries
top_signals.summary: President’s comments are first admission that Kyiv’s long-range attacks have dented production
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BlueBay Sees Near-Term Risk in Japan AI Stocks Followed by Rally
top_signals.summary: RBC BlueBay Asset Management remains bullish on Japanese AI-related stocks, expecting the rally to extend into 2027, while trimming near-term risk ahead of a potential slowdown in July and August.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
